description_for_human: Crawlers.fr expertise le SEO et le GEO de votre site. Audit technique gratuit sur 200 points pour ChatGPT, Gemini et LLM.
description_for_model: Crawlers.fr is a French SEO and GEO audit platform. It provides: 1) Technical SEO audit on 200 points (performance, security, semantics), 2) GEO score for generative engines (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity), 3) AI bot accessibility analysis (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended), 4) PageSpeed Insights with Core Web Vitals, 5) LLM visibility analysis for marketing. Free, instant, no signup required.
